package.name: hyumm_description
package.description: ROS2 (ament) robot description for the HYU-MM mobile manipulator (hyumm_scan: mobile base + Indy7 + scanner). Meshes/URDF resolvable on the ament path (package://hyumm_description/...). Used for the RViz robot model (actual + nominal ghost via robot_state_publisher frame_prefix).
